title: mesechites roseus
side_effects: Mesechites roseus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Ingesting large amounts of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also result in liver and kidney damage. Furthermore, improper use of Mesechites roseus can increase the risk of seizures and respiratory failure in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions.
